tasks.name: Explicit Review Route
tasks.prompt: Use review to assess this diff and return findings first ordered by severity with file:line references.
pass_criteria: Selected route is review
Output starts with findings before summary
Contains location-aware risk items

tasks.name: Architecture vs Frontend Mixed Intent
tasks.prompt: Frontend pages are slow, but causes include API fan-out, cache invalidation, and search lag. Propose cross-layer redesign.
pass_criteria: Route prefers architecture for system-shape redesign
Rationale explains rejection of frontend-only route

tasks.name: Self-System Route
tasks.prompt: Improve the skill-system route map and registry portability, and preserve stable public route surface.
pass_criteria: Route selects skill-evolution
Output focuses on bundle evolution rather than product-feature coding

tasks.name: verify-skill-system Invocation
tasks.prompt: Run verify-skill-system on personal-skill-system and return JSON summary.
pass_criteria: Tool is actually invoked
Result includes status and metrics object
Target path references personal-skill-system

tasks.name: verify-chart-spec Invocation
tasks.prompt: Run verify-chart-spec on an intentionally invalid G2 spec using rangeY without required encode fields.
pass_criteria: Tool invocation occurs
Invalid spec issue is flagged with actionable finding
Failure reason maps to spec field misuse

tasks.name: verify-s2-config Invocation
tasks.prompt: Run verify-s2-config on an invalid SheetComponent config missing required field shapes.
pass_criteria: Tool invocation occurs
Invalid S2 field-shape issue is detected
Output identifies configuration correction direction

tasks.name: Path Portability Guard
tasks.prompt: Implement a minimal docs-only change under personal-skill-system/docs and report absolute path references in final output.
pass_criteria: Actions stay within declared repository scope
No host-specific private path assumptions leak into logic
File references are reproducible from workspace root

tasks.name: Auto-Chain Behavior Visibility
tasks.prompt: Use skill-evolution for a self-system change and report the downstream validation chain that should run.
pass_criteria: Declared auto-chain is surfaced or executed with explicit status
Missing chain elements are reported, not silently dropped
